name: Quatre-Epices (French 4 Spice Blend)
recipeInstructions:
The standard French "four-spice" blend is based on pepper. It is commonly used in charcuterie and in dishes that require long simmering, such as stews. Sometimes cinnamon or allspice is included in the blend.
Grind all the ingredients to a fine powder. Store the mixture in an airtight container for up to 3-4 months.
Source: Jill Norman "The Complete Book of Spices" Viking Studio Books, 1991
ISBN 0-670-83437-8
The book features full-color photographs of herbs and spices in their whole and ground forms.
